steps.title: Identify the antecedent and grammatical structure
steps.content: The blank is a possessive determiner modifying peer autonomous Soviet socialist republics. Its antecedent—the noun it refers to—is the Tajik Republic, which appears as a singular entity throughout the passage.

steps.title: Apply the possessive agreement rule
steps.content: A possessive determiner must agree with its antecedent in number. Its is correct because the antecedent is singular. Their violates the rule by being plural; it's and they're are verb contractions, not possessives. That matches choice C — C is correct.
